name: ObjectPropertiesPage
summary: Base class used to add object property user interface panels

constructors.name: ObjectPropertiesPage
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ObjectPropertiesPage class

methods.name: AnySelectedObject<T>()
methods.signature: public bool AnySelectedObject<T>() where T : RhinoObject
methods.summary: Return true if any of the selected objects match the given type

methods.name: AnySelectedObject<T>(Boolean)
methods.signature: public bool AnySelectedObject<T>(bool allMustMatch) where T : RhinoObject
methods.summary: Return true if any of the selected objects match the given type

params.name: allMustMatch
params.doc: If true then every selected object must match the object type otherwise; only a single object has to be of the specified type

methods.name: GetSelectedObjects(ObjectType)
methods.summary: Get selected objects that match a given filter

methods.name: GetSelectedObjects<T>()
methods.signature: public T[] GetSelectedObjects<T>() where T : RhinoObject
methods.summary: Get selected objects of a given type

methods.name: InitializeControls
methods.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("InitializeControls is obsolete, override UpdatePage instead")] public virtual void InitializeControls(RhinoObject rhObj)
methods.summary: Called on the active page after the selected objects list has changed to notify the page to initialize its content to reflect the new object list.

methods.name: ModifyPage
methods.summary: Call this method when the page is ready to modify the selected objects list. Rhino will suspend UpdatePageNotfictaion, call the passed action then restore UpdatePageNotfictaion.

params.name: callbackAction
params.doc: Called when it is safe to modify objects.

methods.name: OnActivate
methods.summary: Called when this page is activated/deactivated.

params.name: active
params.doc: If true then this page is on top otherwise it is about to be hidden.

returns.doc: If true then the page is hidden and the requested page is not activated otherwise will not allow you to change the current page. Default returns true. The return value is currently ignored.

methods.name: OnCreateParent
methods.summary: Called when the parent container is initially created.

methods.name: OnHelp
methods.summary: Called when the F1 key or help button is pressed, override to display plug-in specific help for this page.

methods.name: OnSizeParent
methods.signature: public virtual void OnSizeParent(int width, int height)
methods.summary: Called when the parent containers client rectangle size has changed and the PageControl has been resized.

methods.name: PageIcon
methods.summary: Icon to display in the object properties tab control. Will not get called if PageIconEmbeddedResourceString is overridden and provides a string for a successfully loaded icon resource.

params.name: sizeInPixels
params.doc: The requested icon size in pixels, DPI scaling has been applied. The default value is 24 X DPI scale.

methods.name: RunScript(ObjectPropertiesPageEventArgs)
methods.summary: This method is called when scripting the Rhino Properties command and choosing this page.

params.name: e
params.doc: Provides access to the selected object list and document.

methods.name: RunScript(RhinoDoc, RhinoObject[])
methods.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("RunScript(RhinoDoc doc, RhinoObject[] objectList) is obsolete, override RunScript(ObjectPropertiesPageEventArgs e) instead")] public virtual Result RunScript(RhinoDoc doc, RhinoObject[] objectList)
methods.summary: This method is called when scripting the Rhino Properties command and choosing this page.

params.name: objectList
params.doc: List of objects selected by the Properties command.

methods.name: ShouldDisplay(ObjectPropertiesPageEventArgs)
methods.summary: Called when the selected objects list changes, return true if the object list contains one or more object the page can modify.

methods.name: ShouldDisplay(RhinoObject)
methods.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("ShouldDisplay(RhinoObject rhObj) is obsolete, override ShouldDisplay(ObjectPropertiesPageEventArgs e) instead")] public virtual bool ShouldDisplay(RhinoObject rhObj)
methods.summary: Called when the selected objects list changes, return true if the object list contains one or more object the page can modify.

methods.name: UpdatePage
methods.summary: Called on the active page after the selected objects list has changed to notify the page to initialize its content to reflect the new object list.

properties.name: AllObjectsMustBeSupported
properties.summary: Returns true when running on Mac which requires only objects of SupportedTypes. Returns false when running on Windows which only requires a single item of SupportedTypes to be selected. Override if you wish to change the above behavior.

properties.name: EnglishPageTitle
properties.summary: English string used to describe this page

properties.name: Icon
properties.summary: (OBSOLETE - Override PageIcon instead) Icon to display in the object properties tab control

properties.name: Index
properties.summary: The page navigation control adds buttons in the order the pages are processed, override this method and return a sort index to move the button to the beginning of the list. By default this returns -1 which puts the button at the end of the list.

properties.name: LocalPageTitle
properties.summary: Localized page description string, returns the EnglishPageTitle by default.

properties.name: PageControl
properties.summary: The control that represents this page. Rhino Windows supports classes that implement the IWin32Windows interface, are derived from System.Windows.FrameworkElement or Eto.Forms.Control. Mac Rhino supports controls that are derived from NSview or Eto.Forms.Control.

properties.name: PageIconEmbeddedResourceString
properties.summary: Resource string for a embedded icon resource in the assembly containing the page instance. If this returns a valid resource and Rhino can load the icon the loaded icon will get used directly otherwise; the PageIcon method will get called.

properties.name: PageType
properties.summary: Override this and return the page you want to replace a specific object properties page.

properties.name: SelectedObjects
properties.summary: Return a list of Rhino objects to be processed by this object properties page

properties.name: SupportedTypes
properties.summary: Override to specify which objects this page supports

properties.name: SupportsSubObjects
properties.summary: If your object properties page supports sub-object selection, you should override this method and return true. This is ignored for view pages. The default implementation returns false.
